'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 110''' is the one hundred tenth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[April 2]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[The Word for World is Death!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[The Word for World is Death!]]"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Heroes of the galaxy Part 5"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 20: Confrontation with Ryker!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Rocket ship!"
